translations.zh: "汝若能掌握其力，必於遠行之途大有助益。"
translations.en: "'Twill serve thee well in thy travels if thou dost learn to master its powers."

translations.zh: "欲開月之門，取石持之，慎置於汝身前數尺。"
translations.en: "To open a gate, use the stone, and carefully position it a few feet from thee."

translations.zh: "汝將發現位置乃是關鍵所在。"
translations.en: "Thou wilt discover that the placement is the key."
"In the proper positions,

translations.zh: 此石便能召出月之門，攜汝至無數遠方。"
translations.en: the stone canst conjure gates to take thee to numerous destinations."
mant,rune
"Ask the leaders of each town to tell thee of that.
comp
"Do thou ask @Tholden."
thol
"He is my @chancellor."
chan
"Aye, Tholden is my chancellor."
mous,sher
"Please take good care of my little friend."
"Ah, thou hast heard of my little friend?"
"Her name is Sherry, and I'm quite proud of her."

translations.zh: "朕敢說，她乃不列顛尼亞境內唯一會說話的鼠。"
translations.en: "I'm certain she is the only talking mouse in all of Britannia."
"Thou art welcome to see her, if thou dost wish."

translations.zh: "汝可在城堡各處尋得她的蹤跡。"
translations.en: "Thou canst find her wandering throughout the castle."

translations.zh: "她每夜必至朕之寢室，朕便講@故事與她聽。"
translations.en: "She comes by my room every night, so I can tell her @stories."
wiza,oz,book
"I collect rare books."

translations.zh: "其中有一本，朕多年來苦尋而不得。"
translations.en: "There's one in particular I've been hunting for many years."

translations.zh: "那書名喚《綠野仙蹤》，汝可曾聽聞？"
translations.en: "It's called 'The Wizard of Oz.' Ever heard of it?"
bedt,stor

translations.zh: "朕最愛的故事是《@獅子修伯特》。"
translations.en: "My favorite story is '@Hubert the Lion.'"
favo,hube,lion

translations.zh: "自幼便聽過此故事，從此銘記於心。"
translations.en: "I've known it by heart, ever since I heard it as a child."

translations.zh: "獅子修伯特性情高傲又虛榮，尤以那華麗鬃毛為傲。"
translations.en: "Hubert the Lion was haughty and vain, and especially proud of his elegant mane."

translations.zh: "然此等自負實非美事，獅子修伯特終難免一場跌落之厄。"
translations.en: "But conceit of this sort is not proper at all, and Hubert the Lion was due for a fall."
mr,nose
heal
than

translations.zh: "該道謝的是朕才對，聖者，汝為不列顛尼亞所做之事，朕銘感於心。"
translations.en: "'Tis I who should thank thee, Avatar, for all thou hast done for Britannia."
bye
"May fortune favor thee."
"I cannot help thee with that."
yn

translations.zh: "也罷，汝若於旅途中偶得此書，
translations.en: "Well, if thou dost run across it in thy travels,

translations.zh: 朕將深為感激，望汝攜回於此。"
translations.en: I would greatly appreciate if thou couldst bring it here."

translations.zh: "朕已許下重賞，凡能為朕尋得一本者，必賜厚報。"
translations.en: "I hath promised a great reward to whosoever shalt bring me a copy."

translations.zh: "汝身負之物過重，朕難以妥善賞賜……"
translations.en: "Thou art carrying too much for me to reward thee properly..."

translations.zh: "待汝身輕之時，再將書攜回吧。"
translations.en: "Bring the book back later, when thou art less burdened."
"Thou hath found a copy!"
"Long hath I anticipated this moment..."

translations.zh: "自幼之後，朕未曾再讀此奇妙之書。"
translations.en: "Not since my childhood have I read this wondrous story."

translations.zh: 他小心翼翼接過古書，「此為汝之賞賜。」說罷遞給你數枚閃耀寶石。
translations.en: Gingerly, he takes the tome. "Here is your reward." He gives you some glowing gems.
"Who told thee of that nickname!?"

translations.zh: "也罷，朕寧願汝莫再如此稱呼朕。"
translations.en: "Well, I'd rather thou didst not call me that."

translations.zh: 不列顛王揮手一指，汝之全隊眾人皆獲療癒！
translations.en: Lord British waves his hand, and your whole party is healed!
